infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 22 - 24 May 2026 From The Stewards To The Team Manager, TGR Haas F1 Team Document 64 Date 23 May 2026 Time 15:41 The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, summoned (document 59) and heard from the team representative, have considered the following matter

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
TGR Haas F1 Team
Document 64
Date 23 May 2026
Time 15:41
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, summoned (document 59) and
heard from the team representative, have considered the following matter and determine the
following:
No / Driver 31 - Esteban Ocon
Competitor TGR Haas F1 Team
Time 11:56
Session Sprint
Fact Car 31 was reported as having air released on the left rear tyre with the wheel fitted
to the car.
Infringement Alleged breach of Point 2.5, Point 2.7 and Point 2.8 of  FIA-F1-DOC-062A Tyre
Operating Procedure
Decision No further action.
Reason The Stewards heard from the team Sporting Director, team Engineer, the FIA
Technical Delegate and the Grid Scrutineer assigned to Car 31, and reviewed video
evidence from Car 11 (the car behind Car 31 on the grid), and from the FIA grid
camera for position 14 (the starting position for Car 31).
The Stewards also inspected the tyre blanket and tyre pressure guage from Car 31.
This video evidence proved conclusively that there was no breach of the regulations
in that there was no contact with the tyre that would have resulted in pre
